title: Festival of the Spoken Nerd: Just for Graphs
full_description: The science comedy phenomenon returns, and this time they're off the chart! Join stand-up mathematician Matt Parker, experiments maestro Steve Mould and geek songstress Helen Arney for graph-a-minute fun on an unprecedented linear scale. Explosive live experiments and statistically significant laughter, packed with spreadsheets, irreverent asides, science-focused songs, number squares, an anti-Mexican wave and a lot of spectacular pyrotechnics.
ai_summary: Matt Parker, Steve Mould, and Helen Arney bring their science comedy show back to the Fringe — an hour of live experiments, maths songs, anti-Mexican waves, and fire parabolas for the graph-a-minute generation.
